testcase.name: test_resend_nonexistent_email_returns_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cognito_auth.py:92: in test_resend_nonexistent_email_returns_404 assert r.status_code == 404, r.text E AssertionError: {"message":"A new verification code has been sent."} E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_wrong_credentials_returns_401
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cognito_auth.py:105: in test_login_wrong_credentials_returns_401 assert r.status_code in (401, 404), r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Invalid request parameters."} E assert 400 in (401, 404) E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_unverified_returns_403
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cognito_auth.py:112: in test_login_unverified_returns_403 assert r.status_code == 403, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Invalid request parameters."} E assert 400 == 403 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
